TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Letsie III = Mntucing hngkawas 1963 idas 7 jiyax 17 ka Letsie III ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Lesotho ta sayang o kiya ka Letsie III, pnaah hngkawas 1996 idas 2 jiyax 7 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. = Letsie III = Kndusan Lezier III u mntuting kngkawas 1963 idas 7 diyax 17, kiya ka qbsuran laqi snaw wada mrdang Bukung qnlhangan Lesotho Mo Shushu II. Kngkawas 1968 dhuq kngkawas 1972, Lezier III laqi tiping cida u mniq Maseru na Iketsetseng Pyasa Tutiping mnhdu 5 knkawas pyasan. Kngkawas 1973, musa Ingkoku muyas 1 Pyasan Roma Tyenskyo. Kngkawas 1977, mniq Pyasan Sweyweyn Ampley muyas pyasan tubaraw. Kngkawas 1980 dhuq kngkawas 1984, Lezier III pa tbrinah miyah qnlhangan muyas Pyasan Tubeyhing Lesotho, wada mangal hwaswey mi wenswey sweys sweywey. Kngkawas 1984 dungan u musa Ingkoku Pyasan Tubeyhing Bristol muyas smluhay horicu Ingkoku, mnhdu muyas daw wada mtmay Pyasan Tubeyhing Cambridge mi Pyasan Tubeyhing London muyas dungan. Kngkawas 1989 idas 12 diyax 16, Lezier III u tbrinah miyah qnlhangan wada psdhuwan phiyu Nniqan Knbaraw Cyocang, kiya u mniq Maseru Sucngting mi Pnwaya Keyngpo Kaygi qmpah. Kngkawas 1990, tama niya Mo Shushu II u wada plaxan seyhu heytay mi pltadan dha qnlhangan icil, mntna kngkawas hiya ka wada psdhuwan Bukung Lesotho, mnhdu psdhu daw wada splawa Lezier III. Kngkawas 1992, tama Lezier III u Mo Shushu II mnhdu kndusan qndriqan tbrinah miyax qnlhangan, ini palix miying hniwan Bukung niya. Lezier III pa smruwa tbrinah mangal hniwan Bukung dungan, so muda ptalax mrrudu ka qnlhangan. Kngkawas 1994 idas 8, wada mrrhak Gikay ka mpdkuh hiya mi mnseyngkyo seyhu, kiya u alaw tama niya tbrinah Bukung wada snbalay elu. Kngkawas 1995 idas 1, Lezier III u malax hniwan niya Bukung, kiya mi tama niya ka tbrinah mBukung dungan. Binaw so kawas kngkawas 1996 idas 1, tama niya Mo Shushu wada muda snturung qnrqilan ttatuk rulu mi mrdang, mntna kngkawas idas 2 diyax 7 Lezier III ka tbrinah mBukung dungan, mniq idas 10 diyax 31 psdhuwan phiyu. Tnsapah ¬∑ tama: Mo Shushu II. ¬∑ bubu: Mamohato qridin Bukung. ¬∑ qridin: Masenati Mamohato Seeiso. ¬∑ llaqi: o Lerotholi Seeiso Wangc, mpBukung saya. o Senati Seeiso Kongcu. o MaSeeiso kongcu. o 'M'aSeeiso Splawa Hwangs
S.PHON: = l…ôtsi…ô iii = mntu ¶iŇč ńßŇčkawas **** idas * …üijax ** ka l…ôtsi…ô iii ga, …ômpklaw ka ńßija. bukuŇč klwaan l…ôsotńßo ta sajaŇč o kija ka l…ôtsi…ô iii, pnaańß ńßŇčkawas **** idas * …üijax * pn…ĺa…üiŇč kmlawa klwaan. = l…ôtsi…ô iii = kndusan l…ô*i…ô…ĺ iii u mntutiŇč kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax **, kija ka qbsu…ĺan laqi snaw wada m…ĺdaŇč bukuŇč qnlńßaŇčan l…ôsotńßo mo sńßusńßu ii. kŇčkawas **** dńßuq kŇčkawas ****, l…ô*i…ô…ĺ iii laqi tipiŇč ¶ida u mniq mas…ô…ĺu na ik…ôts…ôts…ôŇč pjasa tutipiŇč mnńßdu * knkawas pjasan. kŇčkawas ****, musa iŇčkoku mujas * pjasan …ĺoma tj…ônskjo. kŇčkawas ****, mniq pjasan sw…ôw…ôn ampl…ô mujas pjasan tuba…ĺaw. kŇčkawas **** dńßuq kŇčkawas ****, l…ô*i…ô…ĺ iii pa tb…ĺinańß mijańß qnlńßaŇčan mujas pjasan tub…ôńßiŇč l…ôsotńßo, wada maŇčal ńßwasw…ô mi w…ônsw…ô sw…ôs sw…ôw…ô. kŇčkawas **** duŇčan u musa iŇčkoku pjasan tub…ôńßiŇč b…ĺistol mujas smluńßaj ńßo…ĺi ¶u iŇčkoku, mnńßdu mujas daw wada mtmaj pjasan tub…ôńßiŇč ¶amb…ĺidg…ô mi pjasan tub…ôńßiŇč london mujas duŇčan. kŇčkawas **** idas ** dijax **, l…ô*i…ô…ĺ iii u tb…ĺinańß mijańß qnlńßaŇčan wada psdńßuwan pńßiju nniqan knba…ĺaw ¶jo ¶aŇč, kija u mniq mas…ô…ĺu su ¶ŇčtiŇč mi pnwaja k…ôŇčpo kajgi qmpańß. kŇčkawas ****, tama nija mo sńßusńßu ii u wada plaxan s…ôńßu ńß…ôtaj mi pltadan dńßa qnlńßaŇčan i ¶il, mntna kŇčkawas ńßija ka wada psdńßuwan bukuŇč l…ôsotńßo, mnńßdu psdńßu daw wada splawa l…ô*i…ô…ĺ iii. kŇčkawas ****, tama l…ô*i…ô…ĺ iii u mo sńßusńßu ii mnńßdu kndusan qnd…ĺiqan tb…ĺinańß mijax qnlńßaŇčan, ini palix mijiŇč ńßniwan bukuŇč nija. l…ô*i…ô…ĺ iii pa sm…ĺuwa tb…ĺinańß maŇčal ńßniwan bukuŇč duŇčan, so muda ptalax m…ĺ…ĺudu ka qnlńßaŇčan. kŇčkawas **** idas *, wada m…ĺ…ĺńßak gikaj ka mpdkuńß ńßija mi mns…ôŇčkjo s…ôńßu, kija u alaw tama nija tb…ĺinańß bukuŇč wada snbalaj …ôlu. kŇčkawas **** idas *, l…ô*i…ô…ĺ iii u malax ńßniwan nija bukuŇč, kija mi tama nija ka tb…ĺinańß mbukuŇč duŇčan. binaw so kawas kŇčkawas **** idas *, tama nija mo sńßusńßu wada muda sntu…ĺuŇč qn…ĺqilan ttatuk …ĺulu mi m…ĺdaŇč, mntna kŇčkawas idas * dijax * l…ô*i…ô…ĺ iii ka tb…ĺinańß mbukuŇč duŇčan, mniq idas ** dijax ** psdńßuwan pńßiju. tnsapańß * tama: mo sńßusńßu ii. * bubu: mamońßato q…ĺidin bukuŇč. * q…ĺidin: mas…ônati mamońßato s…ô…ôiso. * llaqi: o l…ô…ĺotńßoli s…ô…ôiso waŇč ¶, mpbukuŇč saja. o s…ônati s…ô…ôiso koŇč ¶u. o mas…ô…ôiso koŇč ¶u. o 'm'as…ô…ôiso splawa ńßwaŇčs
S.FORM: = Letsie III = Mntucing hngkawas 1963 idas 7 jiyax 17 ka Letsie III ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Lesotho ta sayang o kiya ka Letsie III, pnaah hngkawas 1996 idas 2 jiyax 7 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. = Letsie III = Kndusan Lezier III u mntuting kngkawas 1963 idas 7 diyax 17, kiya ka qbsuran laqi snaw wada mrdang Bukung qnlhangan Lesotho Mo Shushu II. Kngkawas 1968 dhuq kngkawas 1972, Lezier III laqi tiping cida u mniq Maseru na Iketsetseng Pyasa Tutiping mnhdu 5 knkawas pyasan. Kngkawas 1973, musa Ingkoku muyas 1 Pyasan Roma Tyenskyo. Kngkawas 1977, mniq Pyasan Sweyweyn Ampley muyas pyasan tubaraw. Kngkawas 1980 dhuq kngkawas 1984, Lezier III pa tbrinah miyah qnlhangan muyas Pyasan Tubeyhing Lesotho, wada mangal hwaswey mi wenswey sweys sweywey. Kngkawas 1984 dungan u musa Ingkoku Pyasan Tubeyhing Bristol muyas smluhay horicu Ingkoku, mnhdu muyas daw wada mtmay Pyasan Tubeyhing Cambridge mi Pyasan Tubeyhing London muyas dungan. Kngkawas 1989 idas 12 diyax 16, Lezier III u tbrinah miyah qnlhangan wada psdhuwan phiyu Nniqan Knbaraw Cyocang, kiya u mniq Maseru Sucngting mi Pnwaya Keyngpo Kaygi qmpah. Kngkawas 1990, tama niya Mo Shushu II u wada plaxan seyhu heytay mi pltadan dha qnlhangan icil, mntna kngkawas hiya ka wada psdhuwan Bukung Lesotho, mnhdu psdhu daw wada splawa Lezier III. Kngkawas 1992, tama Lezier III u Mo Shushu II mnhdu kndusan qndriqan tbrinah miyax qnlhangan, ini palix miying hniwan Bukung niya. Lezier III pa smruwa tbrinah mangal hniwan Bukung dungan, so muda ptalax mrrudu ka qnlhangan. Kngkawas 1994 idas 8, wada mrrhak Gikay ka mpdkuh hiya mi mnseyngkyo seyhu, kiya u alaw tama niya tbrinah Bukung wada snbalay elu. Kngkawas 1995 idas 1, Lezier III u malax hniwan niya Bukung, kiya mi tama niya ka tbrinah mBukung dungan. Binaw so kawas kngkawas 1996 idas 1, tama niya Mo Shushu wada muda snturung qnrqilan ttatuk rulu mi mrdang, mntna kngkawas idas 2 diyax 7 Lezier III ka tbrinah mBukung dungan, mniq idas 10 diyax 31 psdhuwan phiyu. Tnsapah ¬∑ tama: Mo Shushu II. ¬∑ bubu: Mamohato qridin Bukung. ¬∑ qridin: Masenati Mamohato Seeiso. ¬∑ llaqi: o Lerotholi Seeiso Wangc, mpBukung saya. o Senati Seeiso Kongcu. o MaSeeiso kongcu. o 'M'aSeeiso Splawa Hwangs
S.PHON: = l…ôtsi…ô iii = mntu ¶iŇč ńßŇčkawas **** idas * …üijax ** ka l…ôtsi…ô iii ga, …ômpklaw ka ńßija. bukuŇč klwaan l…ôsotńßo ta sajaŇč o kija ka l…ôtsi…ô iii, pnaańß ńßŇčkawas **** idas * …üijax * pn…ĺa…üiŇč kmlawa klwaan. = l…ôtsi…ô iii = kndusan l…ô*i…ô…ĺ iii u mntutiŇč kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax **, kija ka qbsu…ĺan laqi snaw wada m…ĺdaŇč bukuŇč qnlńßaŇčan l…ôsotńßo mo sńßusńßu ii. kŇčkawas **** dńßuq kŇčkawas ****, l…ô*i…ô…ĺ iii laqi tipiŇč ¶ida u mniq mas…ô…ĺu na ik…ôts…ôts…ôŇč pjasa tutipiŇč mnńßdu * knkawas pjasan. kŇčkawas ****, musa iŇčkoku mujas * pjasan …ĺoma tj…ônskjo. kŇčkawas ****, mniq pjasan sw…ôw…ôn ampl…ô mujas pjasan tuba…ĺaw. kŇčkawas **** dńßuq kŇčkawas ****, l…ô*i…ô…ĺ iii pa tb…ĺinańß mijańß qnlńßaŇčan mujas pjasan tub…ôńßiŇč l…ôsotńßo, wada maŇčal ńßwasw…ô mi w…ônsw…ô sw…ôs sw…ôw…ô. kŇčkawas **** duŇčan u musa iŇčkoku pjasan tub…ôńßiŇč b…ĺistol mujas smluńßaj ńßo…ĺi ¶u iŇčkoku, mnńßdu mujas daw wada mtmaj pjasan tub…ôńßiŇč ¶amb…ĺidg…ô mi pjasan tub…ôńßiŇč london mujas duŇčan. kŇčkawas **** idas ** dijax **, l…ô*i…ô…ĺ iii u tb…ĺinańß mijańß qnlńßaŇčan wada psdńßuwan pńßiju nniqan knba…ĺaw ¶jo ¶aŇč, kija u mniq mas…ô…ĺu su ¶ŇčtiŇč mi pnwaja k…ôŇčpo kajgi qmpańß. kŇčkawas ****, tama nija mo sńßusńßu ii u wada plaxan s…ôńßu ńß…ôtaj mi pltadan dńßa qnlńßaŇčan i ¶il, mntna kŇčkawas ńßija ka wada psdńßuwan bukuŇč l…ôsotńßo, mnńßdu psdńßu daw wada splawa l…ô*i…ô…ĺ iii. kŇčkawas ****, tama l…ô*i…ô…ĺ iii u mo sńßusńßu ii mnńßdu kndusan qnd…ĺiqan tb…ĺinańß mijax qnlńßaŇčan, ini palix mijiŇč ńßniwan bukuŇč nija. l…ô*i…ô…ĺ iii pa sm…ĺuwa tb…ĺinańß maŇčal ńßniwan bukuŇč duŇčan, so muda ptalax m…ĺ…ĺudu ka qnlńßaŇčan. kŇčkawas **** idas *, wada m…ĺ…ĺńßak gikaj ka mpdkuńß ńßija mi mns…ôŇčkjo s…ôńßu, kija u alaw tama nija tb…ĺinańß bukuŇč wada snbalaj …ôlu. kŇčkawas **** idas *, l…ô*i…ô…ĺ iii u malax ńßniwan nija bukuŇč, kija mi tama nija ka tb…ĺinańß mbukuŇč duŇčan. binaw so kawas kŇčkawas **** idas *, tama nija mo sńßusńßu wada muda sntu…ĺuŇč qn…ĺqilan ttatuk …ĺulu mi m…ĺdaŇč, mntna kŇčkawas idas * dijax * l…ô*i…ô…ĺ iii ka tb…ĺinańß mbukuŇč duŇčan, mniq idas ** dijax ** psdńßuwan pńßiju. tnsapańß * tama: mo sńßusńßu ii. * bubu: mamońßato q…ĺidin bukuŇč. * q…ĺidin: mas…ônati mamońßato s…ô…ôiso. * llaqi: o l…ô…ĺotńßoli s…ô…ôiso waŇč ¶, mpbukuŇč saja. o s…ônati s…ô…ôiso koŇč ¶u. o mas…ô…ôiso koŇč ¶u. o 'm'as…ô…ôiso splawa
